plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Field Service Mobile to access your location while you are logged in and working assigned jobs.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Field Service Mobile to access photos so technicians can attach job update images.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Field Service Mobile to access your location while you are logged in and working assigned jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Field Service Mobile to access photos so technicians can attach job update images.
